Gets the physical address or location of the event.
getCapacity() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the maximum number of attendees allowed for the event.
getContent() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.Comment
Gets the text content of the comment.
getCoOrganizerIds() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the list of device IDs for the event's co-organizers.

Gets the current device ID to use as the organizer's user ID.
getCurrentUserId() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
Gets the current device ID to use as the organizer's user ID.

Gets the current number of users on the waiting list.
getDescription() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the description of the event.
getDeviceId() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.EntrantProfile
Gets the unique device ID associated with this profile.
getDrawDate() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the date the lottery draw occurs.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.EntrantProfile
Gets the user's email address.
getEndDate() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the end date and time of the event.
getEntrantId() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.Comment
Gets the unique identifier of the entrant who posted the comment.
getEntrantName() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.Comment
Gets the display name of the entrant who posted the comment.
getEventById(String, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<Event>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepository
Fetches an event from Firestore using its event ID.
getEventById_existingEvent_returnsEvent() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that getEventById returns the event when the Firestore document exists.
getEventById_missingEvent_callsFailure() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that getEventById returns an error when the event document does not exist.
getEventsByOrganizerId(String, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<List<Event>>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepository
Fetches all events for param organizerId from the Firestore.
getEventsByOrganizerOrCoOrganizer(String, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<List<Event>>) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepository
Fetches all events where the user is either the primary organizer OR a co-organizer.

Gets the type/category of the event.
getEventVisibility() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the visibility of the event.
getId() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the unique identifier for the event.

Returns the total number of items in the data set held by the adapter.

Returns the total number of entrants in the list.

Gets the total number of tabs managed by this adapter.

Retrieves the unique Android ID for the current device.

Gets the name of the event.

Gets the user's display name.

Gets the ID of the organizer who created the event.

Gets the user's phone number.

Gets the URL of the event's promotional poster image.

Helper method to map the current profile's attributes to a HashMap for Firestore storage.

Gets the hashed content string used for generating the event's QR code.

Gets the date when registration closes.
getRegistrationStart() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the date when registration opens.
getRole() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.EntrantProfile
Gets the account role/type for the user.

Gets the monetary fee required to sign up for the event.
getStartDate() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the start date and time of the event.
getStatus() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the current status of the event (e.g., open, closed, drawn).
getTimestamp() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.models.Comment
Gets the timestamp of when the comment was posted.

Gets a View that displays the data at the specified position in the data set.

Gets a View that displays the data at the specified position in the data set.
getWaitlistLimit() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
Gets the maximum limit for the waiting list, if one exists.
grabData() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageEventsActivity
Fetches the data from the database and populates the eventList so event information can be rendered onto the screen.
grabData() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageImagesActivity
Fetches the data from the database and populates the eventList so the data that the event holds regarding the poster can be used to render the poster onto the screen.
grabData() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageOrganizersActivity
Fetches the data from the database and populates the organizersList and organizerEventsMap so the data that the event holds regarding the organizer can be used to render the organizer name onto the screen.
grabData() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.ManageProfilesActivity
Fetches the data from the database and populates the profileList so the profile attributes can be rendered onto the screen.
